case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. ELY CHERESHSKAYA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION ANN K. MERRILL FLED RE: WAIVER OF ALL ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHERESHSKAYA, ELY $8,281.35 PRINCIPAL, $426.55 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,932.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT CHERESHSKAYA, ELY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-09-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-07-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-24-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD SERVED FEB-06-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHERESHSKAYA, ELY
